title: Handwoven Macrame Coasters
excerpt: Create a beautiful set of macrame coasters that will protect your tables in style.

steps.title: Cut cords
steps.description: Cut 8 pieces of cord, each 60cm long for one coaster.

steps.title: Start center
steps.description: Cross 4 cords over 4 others and begin weaving in a circular pattern.

steps.title: Continue spiral
steps.description: Use half hitch knots to spiral outward until you reach desired size.

steps.title: Finish edges
steps.description: Tuck ends under or trim close and seal with fabric glue.

tips: Make a set of 4-6 for a complete gift set
Add cork backing for extra table protection
